nasb.text: Then the nations that are left round about you will know that I, the Lord, have rebuilt the ruined places and planted that which was desolate; I, the Lord, have spoken and will do it.”

esv.text: Then the nations that are left all around you shall know that I am the Lord; I have rebuilt the ruined places and replanted that which was desolate. I am the Lord; I have spoken, and I will do it.

cnv.text: 那時，在你們四圍所餘剩的列國，就必知道我是耶和華，是我重建了那些毀壞的地方，栽植了那些荒涼之地。我耶和華說了，就必實行。

ccb.text: 这样，你们四周其余的民族便知道我耶和华已重建毁坏之处，重新耕种荒废之地。我耶和华言出必行。’
